paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as a report on why the company's stock price tumbled more than 28 percent in after-hours trading. The earnings call is scheduled to take place on August 13, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Additionally, the company has issued $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00 percent convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
